measurement_note: Size is n, the array length. The 8/32/128 tiers span 16x and place 1000 and 999 among otherwise minimal values, so the expected product is 999*998 = 997002 at every tier. A single scan takes O(n) time. Correct enumeration of every distinct index pair takes O(n^2), completes normally at n = 128, and is rejected by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: length 8 with two isolated maxima
benchmark: length 32 with two isolated maxima
benchmark: length 128 with two isolated maxima
